items.summary:
Bluetti has launched a Memorial Day Sale that is continuing much of the pricing from the previous Hurricane Prep Sale, as well as giving our readers exclusive bonus savings (5%, 6%, and 8% off codes below) to some of the best prices in 2026. Among the legacy models added in, you can currently pick up the 1,152Wh AC180 Portable Power Station with the newest alternator & solar dual DC charger 2 down at $758.10 shipped, after using the sitewide code 9TO5TOYS5OFF at checkout, beating Amazon’s pricing by $241. Normally fetching $999 these days since Bluetti permanently cut MSRPs across the board to better align with market rates, we’ve mostly seen this bundle keeping between $999 and $899 since it launched in January, with some earlier 2026 falls to the $749 low (last seen in early March). Now, with our exclusive savings code, you’re getting a combined $241 markdown off the going rate for the second-lowest price we have tracked – just $9 above the low. You can also pick up the standalone station down at $426.55 shipped, after using the same code above, beating Amazon by $72. Head below to browse the full lineup of deals and get all three of our bonus savings codes.

items.title: EcoFlow 48-hour Memorial Day flash sale cuts up to 57% off 716Wh to 12.2kWh power station setups for 2026 lows from $349
items.summary:
As part of its ongoing RV Season Sale that will run through the rest of May, EcoFlow has also launched a 48-hour Memorial Day flash sale with up to 57% savings on four power stations ranging from 716Wh to 12.2kWh. Among the group is the return 2,048Wh bundle of EcoFlow’s DELTA 3 Max Portable Power Station with a 500W alternator charger for $949 shipped, beating Amazon’s pricing by $50. We saw this same bundle offered a week ago in a similar flash sale window coming down from its $1,848 full price direct from the brand, though it’s been consistently keeping around $999 elsewhere, like at Amazon. The deal here gives you the second-lowest price we have tracked overall (behind a one-time fall to $848 in November) and the best price in 2026. You can also find flash savings on the 716Wh RIVER 2 Pro 700, the 3,072Wh DELTA 3 Ultra, and an expanded 12.2kWh DELTA Pro Ultra bundle through May 26.
